## Code Quality — Refactor, lint, harden, and modernize existing code.
- **[LP-0002 · Polish Pass](loops/code-quality/LP-0002-polish-pass.md)** `micro` `draft` — The janitor loop. Each pass fixes exactly one small blemish — a lint warning, a dead import, a confusing name, a missing docstring — verifie _(tags: refactor, lint, tidy, low-risk)_

## Testing — Grow coverage, kill flakes, strengthen the safety net.
- **[LP-0003 · Coverage Climber](loops/testing/LP-0003-coverage-climber.md)** `small` `draft` — Raises real test coverage one meaningful test file at a time. Targets the riskiest untested code first, and refuses to game the metric. _(tags: testing, coverage, safety-net)_
